text.en:
If your Army Faction is **ADEPTUS ASTARTES**, at the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Oath of Moment target. Each time a model with this ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target:

■ You can re-roll the Hit roll.
■ If you are using a Codex: Space Marines Detachment and your army does not include one or more units with the **BLACK TEMPLARS**, **BLOOD ANGELS**, **DARK ANGELS**, **DEATHWATCH** or **SPACE WOLVES** keywords, or one or more units from those factions' Munitorum Field Manual sections, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

■ If an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Marneus Calgar has both the **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** and **ULTRAMARINES** Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Ultramarines Chapter.

■ You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army.

■ If your army includes one or more **BLACK TEMPLARS** units, it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER** models, and cannot include any of the following models that do not have the Black Templars keyword: **GLADIATOR LANCER**; **GLADIATOR REAPER**; **GLADIATOR VALIANT**; **IMPULSOR**; **REPULSOR**; **REPULSOR EXECUTIONER**.

■ If your army includes one or more **SPACE WOLVES** units, it cannot include any of the following units: **APOTHECARY**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**.

**DEATHWATCH**

■ Your army can include **ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH** units, but it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units drawn from any other Chapter.
■ With the exception of **KILL TEAM CASSIUS** (see *Legends: Agents of the Imperium*), your army cannot include any **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM DEATHWATCH** units.
■ Your army cannot include any of the following units: **ASSAULT SQUAD**; **ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS**; **ATTACK BIKE SQUAD**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **LAND SPEEDER STORM**; **RELIC TERMINATOR SQUAD**; **SCOUT BIKE SQUAD**; **SCOUT SQUAD**; **SCOUT SNIPER SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**; **TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD**; **TERMINATOR SQUAD**.

Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle.
DEVASTATOR DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
TACTICAL DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
ASSAULT DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

At the start of up to three of your Command phases, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army. You cannot select a Combat Doctrine you have already selected this battle, unless a friendly **MARNEUS CALGAR** model is on the battlefield.
Devastator Doctrine
This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
Tactical Doctrine
This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
Assault Doctrine
This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
Each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re‐roll a Wound roll of 1.

Once per battle round, after your Oath of Moment target is destroyed, if a **CAANOK VAR** model from your army is on the battlefield, select one enemy unit visible to that model. That enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until you select a new one.

Each time an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army disembarks from a **TRANSPORT** (excluding **FLY**) that made a Normal or Advance move this phase (excluding those that arrived from Strategic Reserves), that disembarked unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to D3+3" instead if that **TRANSPORT** is a **HEAVY TRANSPORT** (see Keywords).
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

At the end of the Fight phase, if a **SUBODEN KHAN** unit from your army destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Each time an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within a terrain feature, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army gain the **ENTRENCHED** keyword while all of the following are true:

■ That unit is within a terrain feature.
■ That unit was not set up on the battlefield this turn.
■ No model in that unit has moved more than 3” this turn.

Each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

Each time a model in a **DARNATH LYSANDER** unit from your army makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

name.ja: インペラトール総攻勢

text.en: In a turn a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit made an ingress/charge move, that unit’s attacks can re-roll hit rolls of 1.
text.de: In einem Zug, in dem eine befreundete FLIEGENDE ADEPTUS-ASTARTES-INFANTERIE-Einheit eine Einsatz-/Angriffsbewegung ausgeführt hat, können für Attacken jener Einheit Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
text.es: Toda unidad VOLADORA INFANTERÍA ADEPTUS ASTARTES amiga puede repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1 de sus ataques si ha hecho un movimiento de inserción/de carga en el mismo turno.
text.fr: À un tour où une unité d’Infanterie de l’Adeptus Astartes amie a fait un mouvement d’arrivée/de charge, ses attaques peuvent relancer les jets de touche de 1.
text.it: In un turno in cui un'unità di FANTERIA degli ADEPTUS ASTARTES amica con VOLARE ha effettuato un movimento di inserzione/carica, gli attacchi di quell'unità possono ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
text.ja: 味方戦闘者・飛行・インファントリー・ユニットが突入移動/突撃移動を行ったターン中、そのユニットの攻撃はヒットロールの出目1をリロールできる。
text.ko: 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 비행 보병 유닛이 진입/돌격 이동을 수행한 턴에, 그 유닛의 공격은 값이 1인 명중 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
text.zh: 当一个己方阿斯塔特修会飞行步兵单位进行一次入场移动/冲锋移动时，在那个回合中，那个单位的攻击可以重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。

text.en: Each time a ranged attack targets an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

At the start of the battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines abilities. Friendly Adeptus Astartes Psyker units have that ability until the end of the battle round.
  • Biomancy Discipline: This unit has +2" M.
  • Divination Discipline: This unit’s attacks can:
    • Re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
    • Re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
  • Pyromancy Discipline: This unit’s ranged attacks that target an enemy unit within 12" of this unit have +1 AP.
  • Telekinesis Discipline: Ranged attacks that target this unit have ‑1 S.
  • Telepathy Discipline: This unit’s attacks can ignore modifiers to BS, WS and hit rolls.
text.de:
Wähle zu Beginn der Schlachtrunde eine der folgenden Psidisziplin-Fähigkeiten. Befreundete Adeptus-Astartes-Psioniker-Einheiten haben jene Fähigkeit bis zum Ende der Schlachtrunde.
  • Biomantie-Disziplin: Diese Einheit hat +2" B.
  • Prophetie-Disziplin: Für Attacken dieser Einheit können:
    • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
    • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Pyromantie-Disziplin: Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit gegen eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" haben +1 DS.
  • Telekinese-Disziplin: Fernkampfattacken gegen diese Einheit haben ‑1 S.
  • Telepathie-Disziplin: Für Attacken dieser Einheit können Modifikatoren auf BF, KG und Trefferwürfe ignoriert werden.
text.es:
Al inicio de la ronda de batalla, elige 1 de estas habilidades listadas como Disciplina psíquica. Las unidades Psíquico Adeptus Astartes amigas tienen esa habilidad hasta el final de la ronda de batalla.
  • Disciplina de la Biomancia: Esta unidad tiene +2" a M.
  • Disciplina de la Adivinación: En los ataques de esta unidad se pueden:
    • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
    • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
  • Disciplina de la Piromancia: Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad enemiga a 12" o menos de esta unidad tienen +1 a FP.
  • Disciplina de la Telequinesis: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco esta unidad tienen ‑1 a F.
  • Disciplina de la Telepatía: Los ataques de esta unidad pueden ignorar los modificadores a la HP, a la HA y a las tiradas para impactar.
text.fr:
Au début du round de bataille, Choisissez une des aptitudes de Disciplines Psychiques suivantes. Les unités de Psyker de l’Adeptus Astartes amies ont l’aptitude choisie jusqu’à la fin du round de bataille.
  • Discipline de Biomancie : Cette unité a +2" en M.
  • Discipline de Divination : Les attaques de cette unité peuvent :
    • Relancer les jets de touche de 1.
    • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
  • Discipline de Pyromancie : Les attaques de tir de cette unité qui ciblent une unité ennemie à 12" ou moins de cette unité ont +1 en PA.
  • Discipline de Télékinésie : Les attaques de tir qui ciblent cette unité ont ‑1 en F.
  • Discipline de Télépathie : Les attaques de cette unité peuvent ignorer les modificateurs à la CT, la CC et aux jets de touche.
text.it:
All’inizio del round di battaglia scegli una delle seguenti abilità Discipline Psichiche. Le unità Psioniche degli Adeptus Astartes amiche hanno quell’abilità fino alla fine del round di battaglia.
  • Disciplina della Biomanzia: questa unità ha +2" M.
  • Disciplina della Divinazione: gli attacchi di questa unità possono:
    • Ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
    • Ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
  • Disciplina della Piromanzia: gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità nemica entro 12" da questa unità hanno +1 VP.
  • Disciplina della Telecinesi: gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio questa unità hanno ‑1 Fo.
  • Disciplina della Telepatia: gli attacchi di questa unità possono ignorare i modificatori ad AB, AC e ai tiri per colpire.
text.ja:
バトルラウンド開始時、以下のサイキック体系アビリティのうち1個を選択する。そのバトルラウンド終了時まで、味方戦闘者・サイカー・ユニットは、選択されたアビリティを持つ。
  • 生体秘法体系：このユニットの【移】は+2mvの修正を受ける。
  • 予見体系：このユニットの攻撃は以下が可能になる：
    • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールする。
    • ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールする。
  • 焔術体系：このユニットの射撃攻撃が、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを対象にしている場合、その射撃攻撃の【貫】は+1の修正を受ける。
  • 念力体系：このユニットを対象とする射撃攻撃は 【攻】に-1の修正を受ける。
  • 精神感応体系：このユニットの攻撃は【射】、【接】、ヒットロールに対する修正を無視してもよい。
text.ko:
전투 라운드 시작 시, 다음 사이킥 학파 능력 중 하나를 선택합니다. 전투 라운드가 종료될 때까지 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 사이커 유닛에 그 능력을 부여합니다.
  • 생동 학파: 이 유닛에 이동 +2"를 적용합니다.
  • 예지 학파: 이 유닛의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
    • 값이 1인 명중 굴림을 재굴림합니다.
    • 값이 1인 타격 굴림을 재굴림합니다.
  • 염화 학파: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격이 12" 내의 적 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
  • 염동 학파: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 원거리 공격에 위력 -1을 적용합니다.
  • 감응 학파: 이 유닛의 공격이 사격, 근접, 명중 굴림에 적용되는 보정을 무시할 수 있습니다.
text.zh:
在战斗轮次开始时，选择以下一个灵能学派技能。直到战斗轮次结束前，己方阿斯塔特修会灵能者单位拥有被选择的技能。
  • 生物学派：该单位拥有 +2" M。
  • 预知学派：该单位的攻击可以：
    • 重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
    • 重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。
  • 烈焰学派：该单位针对其 12" 内的敌方单位所进行的远程攻击拥有 +1 AP。
  • 念动学派：针对该单位进行的远程攻击拥有 ‑1 S。
  • 感应学派：该单位的攻击可以忽略对 BS、WS 以及命中掷骰的修正。

text.en: Ranged weapons equipped by **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** models from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

If your army includes **VULKAN HE’STAN**, during your turn, each **INFERNUS SQUAD** unit from your army is eligible to do one of the following:

■ Start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced.
■ Shoot in a turn in which it started to perform an Action.

Each time a **TANK ACE** unit from your army (see Keywords) Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

Each time a **TANK ACE** unit from your army shoots in your Shooting phase, if that unit did not Advance this turn, you can re‑roll the Damage roll

• Friendly Land Speeder/Storm Speeder Hailstrike/Storm Speeder Hammerstrike/Storm Speeder Thunderstrike units have Speeder.
  • In your first Movement phase, friendly Speeder units can make an ingress move.
text.de:
• Befreundete Land-Speeder-/Storm-Speeder-Hailstrike-/Storm-Speeder-Hammerstrike-/Storm-Speeder-Thunderstrike-Einheiten haben Speeder.
  • In deiner ersten Bewegungsphase können befreundete Speeder-Einheiten eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen.
text.es:
• Las unidades Land Speeder/Storm Speeder Granizador/Storm Speeder Martilleador/Storm Speeder Atronador amigas tienen Speeder.
  • En tu primera fase de movimiento, las unidades Speeder amigas pueden hacer un movimiento de inserción.
text.fr:
• Les unités de Land Speeders/Storm Speeder Hailstrike/Storm Speeder Hammerstrike/Storm Speeder Thunderstrike amies ont le mot-clé Speeder.
  • À votre première phase de Mouvement, les unités de Speeder amies peuvent faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
text.it:
• Le unità di Land Speeder/Storm Speeder Hailstrike/Storm Speeder Hammerstrike/Storm Speeder Thunderstrike amiche hanno Speeder.
  • Nella tua prima fase di Movimento le unità Speeder amiche possono effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
text.ja:
• 味方ランドスピーダー/ストームスピーダー・ヘイルストライク/ストームスピーダー・ハンマーストライク/ストームスピーダー・サンダーストライク・ユニットは スピーダーを持つ。
  • 自軍の最初の移動フェイズ中、味方スピーダー・ユニットは突入移動を行える。
text.ko:
• 아군 랜드 스피더/스톰 스피더 헤일스트라이크/스톰 스피더 해머스트라이크/스톰 스피더 선더스트라이크 유닛에 스피더를 부여합니다.
  • 플레이어의 첫 번째 이동 페이즈에, 아군 스피더 유닛이 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方兰德速攻艇/冰雹型风暴速攻艇/落锤型风暴速攻艇/雷霆型风暴速攻艇单位拥有速攻艇关键词。
  • 在第一个己方移动阶段中，己方速攻艇单位可以进行一次入场移动。

text.en:
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE** units from your army:

■ Are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.
■ Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

Each time an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE** unit from your army is selected to attack, after resolving those attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is auspex scanned. Each time an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model from your army makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

Friendly Phobos/Scout Squad units have the following ability: Transhuman Perception: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is detected:
  • While a unit is detected, that unit has +3" detection range.
text.de:
Befreundete Phobos-/Scouttrupp-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähig­keit: Transhumane Wahrnehmung: In deiner Fernkampfphase kann diese Einheit eine für sie sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit ist aufgespürt:
  • Solange eine Einheit aufgespürt ist, hat sie +3" Entdeckungs­reichweite.
text.es:
Las unidades Phobos/Escuadra de Exploradores amigas tienen esta habilidad: Percepción transhumana: En tu fase de disparo, esta unidad puede elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga está detectada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté detectada, tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
text.fr: Les unités de Phobos/Escouade Scout amies ont aptitude suivante : Perception Transhumaine : À votre phase de Tir, cette unité peut choisir une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins. L’unité ennemie choisie est détectée : Tant qu’une unité est détectée, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
text.it:
Le unità Phobos/Squadra Esploratori amiche hanno la seguente abilità. Percezione Transumana: nella tua fase di Tiro questa unità può scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12". Quell’unità nemica è rilevata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è rilevata, ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
text.ja:
味方フォボス/スカウト・スカッド・ユニットは、以下のアビリティを持つ： 超人的知覚：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認状態である敵ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された敵ユニットは被探知状態となる：
  • ユニットが検知状態である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
text.ko:
아군 포보스/스카웃 분대 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 초인적인 지각력: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 발각됩니다.
  • 유닛이 발각된 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
text.zh:
己方恐惧型/侦察小队单位拥有以下技能： 超人感官：在己方射击阶段中，该单位可以选择一个位于其 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被发现：
  • 在一个单位被发现时，那个单位的侦测范围 +3"。

text.en: Each time a ranged attack targets an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", the target has the **Benefit** **of Cover**.
Once per battle round, if an **AETHON SHAAN** model from your army is on the battlefield, you can use the Into Darkness Stratagem for 0CP.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select a number of **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units (excluding **TITANIC** units) from your army based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

Each time an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model from your army makes an attack, if it was set up on the battlefield this turn, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If it disembarked from a **DROP POD** this turn, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

Ranged weapons equipped by **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** models from your army have the **[HEAVY]** ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model’s unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

■ Each time an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model from your army makes a melee attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
■ Each time an attack targets an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army, if your unit is within range of an objective marker that you controlled at the start of the phase and if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit or your unit has the **TITUS** keyword, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Ranged weapons equipped by **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** models from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.
Once per phase for each **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their post-human physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: When the fighting is at its fiercest, the veteran warriors of the Chapter truly show their quality.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

fluff.en: Salvo after salvo of burning promethium unleashed in synchronised waves will leave almost any foe as smouldering ash.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability, and when making such an attack, if the attacking model is a **VEHICLE**, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Once a foe is marked for destruction, the Angels of Death must not relent until the target is annihilated.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: With the enemy’s countermeasures and responses predicted and allowed for in advance, the Ultramarines can weather their most ferocious attacks.

target.en: That **HEAVY TRANSPORT** unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after a **HEAVY TRANSPORT** unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

fluff.en: In a last act of vengeance, the doomed crew of this burning transport drive into the midst of the enemy.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is an **ENTRENCHED** unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Aware of how vital it is that the defence line holds, these warriors fight even to their last breath.

target.en: One **TANK ACE** unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.

fluff.en: Bellicose in the extreme, this vehicle’s machine spirit demands immediate vengeance for the hurts it has incurred.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.

effect.en: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

fluff.en: Carefully cogitated binharic prayers can focus a machine spirit’s ire into near-obsessive hatred of its slayers, ensuring that vengeance is meted out even in death.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER** model from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your model’s Move, Toughness, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1 and each time your model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The heroes entombed within Dreadnoughts have fought across countless war zones throughout their extended existences, perfecting their martial prowess beyond mortal limits.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** unit from your army that was reduced to Below Half-strength as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: There are many tales of machine spirits wreaking havoc on the foe, even after the crew of their vehicle are slain and critical systems are failing.

name.en: Only in Death Does Duty End

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Imminent death does not prevent a Space Marine from enacting their final justice upon the enemies of the Imperium.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.

when.en: Your Fight phase.

effect.en: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

fluff.en: The 1st Company’s veterans unleash their skills with an efficiency that is harrowing to witness.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Adeptus Astartes veterans claim critical objectives in daring strikes, annihilating resistance in their Chapter’s name before sweeping onto their next target.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.

restrictions.en: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Teleportarium chambers within orbiting strike cruisers are able to perform site-to-strike teleportations for Terminator-armoured battle-brothers in extremis.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine this battle.

fluff.en: The tenets of the Codex Astartes allow for unorthodox use of combat tactics and the employment of divergent doctrines if doing so will lead to victory.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that is within 8" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.

restrictions.en: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Space Marines know precisely when to give ground in order to leave their enemies floundering, before surging back into the fight and driving them from the field in disarray.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

restrictions.en: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Space Marines are loathe to be brought into combat on any others’ terms, especially the warriors of Stormlance Task Forces, whose battlefield tactics revolve around speed and precise, ferocious assaults.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for your unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine this battle.

fluff.en: No Chapter’s warriors know better the breadth – theoretical and practical – of the Codex Astartes’ teachings, and how these can and should be adapted to ensure victory.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 8" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.

fluff.en: After rapidly making a theoretical assessment of the foes’ probable next moves, the Ultramarines apply practical repositioning to counter them.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES DREADNOUGHT**, **TERMINATOR**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: These custom‐built servo‐skulls detach from augmetic tethers as the Iron Hands pass, settling into sentry patterns around vital strategic sites.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES DREADNOUGHT**, **TERMINATOR**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Your Fight phase.

effect.en: Select either the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** or **[LETHAL HITS]** abilities. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

fluff.en: Running endless up‐to‐the‐second cogitations of their foes’ weak spots and vulnerabilities, Avernii veterans place every blow with punishing precision.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Terminators withdraw from the fight during a lull, board airborne transports and prepare their next assault.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes, combined with their transhuman physiology, makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. In addition, if your unit is a **HEAVY TRANSPORT**, when making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

fluff.en: The mightiest Space Marine transports are unstoppable on the advance.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn (unless your **TRANSPORT** has the Assault Ramp ability), but can otherwise act normally.

fluff.en: Coaxing the utmost from roaring engines, transport crews strive to deploy their passengers as close as possible to their assigned objectives.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: The White Scars read the ebb and flow of battle with the hungry cunning of raptorial predators, reacting to the enemy’s movements with exceptional rapidity.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The riders and pilots sweep away as swiftly as they arrive, regrouping in preparation for their next assault.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is **ENTRENCHED**, you can re‑roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

fluff.en: Codex doctrine when conducting an aggressive defence is to swiftly take up new positions whenever the foe finds your range.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** or **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: The battle‑brothers of the Imperial Fists 1st Company advance with merciless efficiency, eliminating all resistance and staking the Emperor’s claim.

target.en: One friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit within 12" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a **PHOBOS** or **SCOUT SQUAD** unit.

restrictions.en: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: A feigned retreat can be used to overextend eager foes or draw them into deadly arcs of fire.

target.en: Up to two **PHOBOS** and/or **SCOUT SQUAD** units from your army, or one other **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

restrictions.en: Each unit selected for this Stratagem must be more than 3" away from all enemy models.

fluff.en: At the opportune moment, Space Marine infiltration units slip away from battle, only to relocate ready to strike the foe again.

target.en: That unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: The enemy has closed with your warriors. Now you have them precisely where you want them. Unleash upon them the fires of damnation.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army equipped with one or more Torrent weapons.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES** and units with the **FLY** keyword) within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

fluff.en: When faced with an onrushing horde, the Forgefather’s warriors set fire to the earth beneath their feet, impeding their advance and throwing them into confusion.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes, combined with their transhuman physiology, makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Advanced targeting systems and the skill of transhuman gunners ensure that Space Marine tanks keep up a punishing rate of fire, even when extracting themselves from a press of enemies.

target.en: One **TANK ACE** unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6.

fluff.en: Reacting swiftly to enemy movements, this tank’s crew reposition their vehicle, angling armour or taking up an advantageous firing position.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE** unit from your army has finished making its attacks.

effect.en: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that enemy unit does not have the **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

fluff.en: Employing auspex data to reveal weak points in the foe’s formation, the Space Marines exploit these to sow confusion and suppress their targets.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE** unit from your army finished making its attacks.

effect.en: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: An auspex‑guided hail of shock charges blinds the foe’s targeting systems and skews their aim.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit (excluding **BATTLELINE** units) from your army.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.

fluff.en: Tactical scans and cogitator analysis have revealed the enemy’s debase schemes, rendering their movements easier to anticipate and counter.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is a **PHOBOS** or **SCOUT SQUAD** unit, it is also eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Retreating from the fight, these warriors lure their enemies on before swiftly turning the tables and hurling themselves into their now overextended foe.

target.en: Up to two **PHOBOS** and/or **SCOUT SQUAD** units from your army, or one other **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: At the opportune moment, Raven Guard infiltration units slip away from battle, only to relocate ready to strike the foe again.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

fluff.en: As the Space Marines storm forward, their gunships and fighter craft streak overhead, hammering enemy positions with hails of fire to keep the foe pinned.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

fluff.en: The sheer devastating momentum of a Space Marine drop assault shatters one enemy battle line after another.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit (excluding **TITANIC** units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES SMOKE VEHICLE** or **DROP POD** unit within 9" of it.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your units have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets one of your units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

fluff.en: Autolaunchers spit a precogitated spread of blind grenades to baffle organic and mechanical targeting.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that was not set up on the battlefield this turn and one friendly **TRANSPORT** it is able to embark within.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: If your **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is wholly within 6" of that **TRANSPORT**, it can embark within it.

fluff.en: There is always another battle to be fought, and the Space Marines waste no time in fighting it.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of up to 6".

restrictions.en: When making that move, your unit must end that move either wholly within your deployment zone or within range of an objective marker.

fluff.en: Cleaving to duty, the Adeptus Astartes refuse to be drawn out of position. Instead they secure ground to establish new fire lines to the enemy.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army within range of an objective marker.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.

fluff.en: Siege warfare is incomparably brutal. Space Marines battle with the fiercest determination to achieve victory, and will fight unto death to hold every defensive line or to secure gains they have wrested from the enemy.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army ends a Fall Back move.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: The gene‑sons of Roboute Guilliman are masters of his tenets, regardless of which Chapter they hail from.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: All those Space Marines fighting to defend or to expand the Ultramarines stellar realm trust that their conquest – though it must be hard fought for – is nothing short of ordained by the Primarch’s will.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6"+1.

fluff.en: The road to the complete rebuilding of the Five Hundred Worlds will be a long and gruelling one, and those who fight their way along it cannot pause in their advance for even a moment.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: End of the Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: The sheer will of these battle‑brothers to reclaim the sacred Five Hundred Worlds is overwhelming.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT** unit from your army that has no models embarked within it, and one **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army wholly within 6" of that **TRANSPORT**.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Your Infantry unit can embark within that **TRANSPORT**.

restrictions.en: You cannot target an **INFANTRY** unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that cannot normally embark within that **TRANSPORT**, or that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn.

fluff.en: No time can be wasted in punishing the Emperor’s foes. Many are those that deserve death and once one enemy is vanquished, soon must another follow.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: Space Marines’ incredible battlefield awareness enables them to instinctively identify the origin of any enemy fire and punish their attackers.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly **HEAVY TRANSPORT** it is able to embark within.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: If your **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit is wholly within 6" of that **HEAVY TRANSPORT**, it can embark within it.

fluff.en: With steely discipline, Space Marine battle-brothers mount up swiftly, even as the enemy closes in.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Start of the Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Warriors of a Vanguard Spearhead will rig critical objectives with explosives to deny them to the enemy.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** unit (excluding **WALKERS**) from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is Mounted.

fluff.en: On the eve of riding down the most elusive prey, the task force’s expert Techmarines will entreat the engine spirits of their vehicles, honing the iron steeds’ performance to elicit even more speed from them.

target.en: One friendly unengaged ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit that was eligible to fight this phase.
target.de: Eine befreundete FLIEGENDE ADEPTUS-ASTARTES-INFANTERIE-Einheit, die sich nicht im Nahkampf befindet und in dieser Phase zum Kämpfen infrage kam
target.es: Una unidad VOLADORA INFANTERÍA ADEPTUS ASTARTES amiga que no esté trabada y que era apta para combatir durante esta fase.
target.fr: Une unité d’INFANTERIE de l’ADEPTUS ASTARTES amie non engagée qui a le mot-clé VOL et qui était éligible pour combattre à cette phase.
target.it: Un’unità di FANTERIA degli ADEPTUS ASTARTES amica con VOLARE non ingaggiata che era idonea a combattere in questa fase.
target.ja: このフェイズ中に白兵を宣言可能であった味方の非接敵状態である戦闘者・飛行・インファントリー・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 이번 페이즈에 백병전 수행이 가능했던 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 비행 보병 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个在该阶段中可以进行近战的不处于交战状态的己方阿斯塔特修会飞行步兵单位。

when.en: End of the Fight phase.
when.es: Al final de la fase de combate.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento.

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 该己方单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Focused on sweeping the Ork threat from Armageddon, if these warriors find themselves unengaged, they press swiftly onward.
fluff.de: Diese Krieger sind darauf aus, die Orks von Armageddon zu vertreiben. Wenn sich keine Feinde mehr in ihrer unmittelbaren Nähe finden, stoßen sie schnell vor.
fluff.es: Estos guerreros, sumidos en plena campaña para purgar la amenaza orka de Armageddon, no paran hasta encontrar a un enemigo que aplastar.
fluff.fr: Voués à débarasser Armageddon des Orks, ces guerriers avanceront sitôt la menace du moment neutralisée.
fluff.it: Determinati a estirpare la minaccia orkesca da Armageddon, se si trovano senza avversari questi guerrieri avanzano rapidamente.
fluff.ja: アルマゲドンからオルクの脅威を一掃すべく戦う彼らは、敵との交戦が終われば、ためらうことなく次なる戦域へと前進する。
fluff.ko: 아마겟돈의 오크 위협 제거에 집중하는 이 전사들은 교전 상태가 아닐 때 신속히 진군한다.
fluff.zh: 这些战士专注于清除哈米吉多顿的欧克蛮人威胁，如果发现周围已经没有任何敌人，他们就会迅速向前推进。

target.en: That friendly <k>ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>VOLADORA INFANTERÍA ADEPTUS ASTARTES</k> amiga.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>INFANTERIE</k> de l’<k>ADEPTUS ASTARTES</k> amie qui a le mot-clé <k>VOL</k>.
target.it: Quell'unità di <k>FANTERIA</k> degli <k>ADEPTUS ASTARTES</k> amica con <k>VOLARE</k>.
target.ja: その味方<k>戦闘者・飛行・インファントリー</k>・ユニット。
target.ko: 그 아군 <k>아뎁투스 아스타르테스 비행 보병</k> 유닛.
target.zh: 那个己方<k>阿斯塔特修会飞行步兵</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to attack.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete FLIEGENDE-ADEPTUS-ASTARTES-INFANTERIE-Einheit, die in diesem Zug eine Angriffsbewegung ausgeführt hat, zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Voladora Infantería Astartes Astartes amiga que ha hecho algún movimiento de carga en este turno se elige para atacar.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quant une unité d’INFANTERIE de l’ADEPTUS ASTARTES amie qui a le mot-clé VOL et qui a fait un mouvement de charge à ce tour est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di FANTERIA degli ADEPTUS ASTARTES amica con VOLARE che ha effettuato un movimento di carica in questo turno viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、このターン中に突撃移動を行った味方戦闘者・飛行・インファントリー・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 이번 턴에 돌격 이동을 수행한 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 비행 보병 유닛이 공격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个在该回合中进行过冲锋移动的己方阿斯塔特修会飞行步兵单位被选中进行攻击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have +1 S.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen +1 a F.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont +1 en F.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno +1 Fo.
effect.ja: そのユニットの白兵攻撃の【攻】は+1の修正を受ける。
effect.zh: 该己方单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 S。

fluff.en: Jump jets blazing, these Space Marine shock troops slam into their foes with bone-breaking force.
fluff.de: Mit auflodernden Düsen ihrer Sprungmodule krachen die Schocktruppen der Space Marines mit vernichtender Kraft in ihre Feinde.
fluff.es: Estas Tropas de choque de los Marines Espaciales se lanzan contra el enemigo con los propulsores de salto a toda mecha y una fuerza arrasadora.
fluff.fr: Réacteurs rugissants, ces troupes de choc des Space Marines s’abattent sur l’ennemi avec une force à rompre les os.
fluff.it: Attivando i reattori dorsali, queste truppe d'assalto degli Space Marines si abbattono sui nemici con forza devastante.
fluff.ja: ジャンプジェットを噴き上げたスペースマリーン強襲部隊は、骨をも砕く衝撃で敵を打ちのめす。
fluff.ko: 불타는 점프 제트를 장비한 스페이스 마린 충격병이 뼈를 분쇄하는 기세와 함께 적을 강타한다.
fluff.zh: 这些星际战士的喷气背包喷射着火焰，以惊人的力量猛烈地撞击敌人。

target.en: One friendly battle-shocked ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit. You can target that unit with this stratagem even though it is battle-shocked.
target.de: Eine befreundete erschütterte ADEPTUS-ASTARTES-Einheit. Du kannst jene Einheit als Ziel dieser Gefechtsoption wählen, obwohl sie ­erschüttert ist.
target.fr: Une unité de l’ADEPTUS ASTARTES amie ébranlée. Vous pouvez cibler cette unité avec ce stratagème même si elle est ébranlée
target.it: Un’unità degli ADEPTUS ASTARTES amica traumatizzata. Puoi scegliere quell’unità come bersaglio di questo stratagemma anche se è traumatizzata.
target.ja: 味方の戦闘ショック状態である戦闘者・ユニット1個。そのユニットが戦闘ショック状態であっても、自軍はそのユニットをこの策略の対象として選択できる。
target.ko: 전투충격 상태인 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛 하나. 전투충격 상태에도 불구하고 이 유닛을 이 스트라타젬의 대상으로 지정할 수 있습니다.
target.zh: 一个处于战斗震慑状态的己方阿斯塔特修会单位。

when.en: Your Command phase.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中。

effect.en: Your unit is no longer battle-shocked.
effect.it: La tua unità non è più traumatizzata.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは戦闘ショック状態ではなくなる。
effect.zh: 该己方单位不再处于战斗震慑状态。

fluff.en: Inspired by duty, these warriors reject dismay and fight on with renewed fury.
fluff.de: Die Pflicht ist diesen Kriegern Inspiration genug, um sich jedem Zweifel zu widersetzen und mit voller Wut weiterzukämpfen.
fluff.es: Con el deber como inspiración, estos guerreros rehúsan bajar las armas y luchan con furia renovada.
fluff.fr: Poussés par le devoir, ces guerriers refusent le désarroi et redoublent de fureur.
fluff.it: Esaltati dal dovere, questi guerrieri rifiutano la costernazione e combattono con furia rinnovata.
fluff.ja: 使命に奮い立つ戦士たちは、いなかる絶望も退け、新たな怒りを燃やして戦い続ける。
fluff.ko: 의무감에 불타는 이 전사들이 절망을 떨쳐내고 새로운 분노로 계속 싸워나간다.
fluff.zh: 受职责感召，这些战士重新振作，以更加高昂的斗志继续战斗。

target.en: That <k>Speeder</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>スピーダー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Speeder unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete Speeder-Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termina un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Speeder amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité de Speeder amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità di Speeder non ingaggiata amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるスピーダー・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 스피더 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方速攻艇单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Triggering sudden flows of power to engines and manoeuvring planes, aggressive advances by the foe can be left foundering in a skimmer’s wake.
fluff.de: Ein Gleiter kann Energie zu seinen Triebwerken und den Manöverfinnen seiner Tragflächen umlenken, um aggressiven Vorstößen des Feindes zu entkommen und ihn verdutzt stehen zu lassen.
fluff.es: Al activar repentinos flujos de energía en ingenios y aviones de guerra, los avances agresivos del enemigo pueden quedar hundidos en la estela de alguno de ellos.
fluff.fr: D'une poussée d'accélération, un glisseur peut laisser sur place un ennemi qui tente de l'approcher.
fluff.it: Innescando improvvisi picchi di potenza nelle macchine e negli aeromobili in manovra si può bloccare l’avanzata aggressiva dei nemici.
fluff.ja: 推進機関と機動翼に瞬間的に出力を流し込むことで、敵の攻勢を急加速で振り切り、飛行艇の航跡に取り残す。
fluff.ko: 엔진에 급격한 동력을 유입해 가변익을 기동하면, 공격적으로 달려들던 적은 스키머가 떠난 자리에서 휘청일 뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 随着强劲的能量瞬间涌入引擎与机动系统，敌军的猛烈攻势终将溃败于这架速攻艇的身后。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Speeder unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete Speeder-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
target.ja: 味方の非接敵状態であるスピーダー・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态的己方速攻艇单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
when.de: Am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al final de la fase de combate del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您对手的近战阶段结束时。

effect.en: Place your unit in strategic reserves.
effect.de: Versetze deine Einheit in die strategische Reserve.
effect.es: Coloca tu unidad en la reserva estratégica.
effect.it: Colloca la tua unità nelle riserve strategiche.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置する。
effect.zh: 将您的单位放入战略预备队。

fluff.en: The anti-grav plates of this combat skimmer thrum with extra power, powering the craft into the atmosphere from where it can redeploy.
fluff.de: Die Antigravplatten dieses Kampfschwebers beben durch zusätzliche Energiezufuhr und er saust gen Atmosphäre, um andernorts neu zuzuschlagen.
fluff.es: Las placas antigravitatorias de este speeder vibran con potencia extra, impulsando la nave hacia la atmósfera, desde donde puede redesplegarse.
fluff.fr: Les plaques antigrav de ce glisseur de combat vrombissent de puissance et propulsent l’appareil dans l’atmosphère, d’où il pourra se redéployer.
fluff.it: Le piastre a-grav di questo aeromobile vibrano di energia, spingendo il velivolo nell’atmosfera per consentirgli di rischierarsi in seguito.
fluff.ja: 戦闘機の反重力板が、追加出力で唸りを上げる。やがて機体は上空へと押し上げられ、再配置可能な高度を確保する。
fluff.ko: 이 전투 스키머의 반중력판이 저음을 내며 출력을 끌어올리자, 기체가 부상하며 재배치가 가능한 고도로 기동한다.
fluff.zh: 这艘战斗速攻艇的反重力板因额外的动力开始震动，使其能够飞入大气层并进行再部署。

target.en: That <k>Speeder</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>スピーダー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Speeder unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Speeder-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Speeder amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Speeder amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Speeder amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方スピーダー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 스피더 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方速攻艇单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until your unit has shot.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 24" um deine Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite, bis deine Einheit geschossen hat.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga a 24" o menos de tu unidad. Dicha unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección hasta que tu unidad haya disparado.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie à 18" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection jusqu’à ce que votre unité ait tiré.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica entro 24" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione finché la tua unità non ha tirato.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの24mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを1個選択する。その自軍ユニットの射撃が終了するまで、選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 24" 내에 있는 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료할 때까지 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 24" 内的敌方单位。在您的单位完成射击前，那个敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。

fluff.en: Speeder crews are trained to exploit their craft’s reconnaissance augurs in a data-link with its weapons to target suddenly revealed foes.
fluff.de: Die Besatzungen von Speedern sind ausgebildet, die Auspexanlagen und Datenverbindungen ihres Gefährts so einzusetzen, dass sie enttarnte Feinde unmittelbar unter Beschuss nehmen können.
fluff.es: Las tripulaciones de speeder están entrenadas para leer los augurios de reconocimiento de sus naves, conectados mediante un enlace de datos con sus armas, y atacar a enemigos que aparecen de improviso.
fluff.fr: Les équipages de Speeders sont formés à exploiter les augures de repérage de leurs appareils en infolien avec ses armes pour cibler les ennemis venant d'être découverts.
fluff.it: Gli equipaggi degli Speeder sono addestrati a usare gli auguri di ricognizione connessi alle armi del veicolo per sparare sui nemici appena sopraggiunti.
fluff.ja: スピーダーの搭乗員は、機体の偵察装置を武器システムとデータ接続して活用する訓練を受けており、突如姿を現した敵を即座に標的として狙うことができる。
fluff.ko: 스피더의 승무원들은 기체의 정찰 조점기 활용법을 훈련으로 터득하여, 그 무기의 데이터링크와 연계해 급습하는 적을 조준할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 速攻艇的乘员们能够将侦察卜测仪与武器的瞄准系统进行数据连接，对突然出现的敌人进行攻击。

target.en: That <k>Phobos</k>/<k>Scout Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>フォボス</k>/</k>スカウト・スカッド</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>恐惧型</k>/<k>侦察小队</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Phobos/Scout Squad</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Phobos</k>-/<k>Scouttrupp</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Phobos/Escuadra de Exploradores</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Phobos</k>/<k>Escouade Scout</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>Phobos/Squadra Esploratori</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>フォボス/スカウト・スカッド</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>포보스/스카웃 분대</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>恐惧型/侦察小队</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.
effect.de: Jene Fernkampfattacken verhindern nicht, dass deine Einheit versteckt ist.
effect.es: Esos ataques a distancia no impiden que tu unidad esté oculta.
effect.fr: Ces attaques de tir n’empêchent pas votre unité d’être cachée.
effect.it: Quegli attacchi da tiro non impediscono alla tua unità di essere nascosta.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃は、その自軍ユニットの隠密状態を解除しない。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 그 원거리 공격에도 불구하고 은폐 상태를 유지합니다.
effect.zh: 这些远程攻击不会阻止您的单位被隐藏。

fluff.en: Holding to the shadows and choosing victims with care, stealthy warriors winnow the enemy ranks without ever revealing their positions.
fluff.de: Diese versteckten Krieger halten sich an die Schatten und wählen ihre Opfer mit Sorgfalt aus. Sie dünnen die feindlichen Reihen aus, ohne ihre Positionen freizugeben.
fluff.es: Aferrándose a las sombras y eligiendo a sus víctimas con cuidado, los Astartes Phobos reducen las filas enemigas sin revelar jamás sus posiciones.
fluff.fr: Choisissant leurs victimes avec soin tout en restant dans l’ombre, les guerriers furtifs déciment les rangs adverses dans jamais révéler leurs positions.
fluff.it: Mantenendosi nell’ombra e scegliendo con cura le vittime, i guerrieri più furtivi sfoltiscono i ranghi avversari senza mai rivelare la propria posizione.
fluff.ja: 影に身を潜め、標的を慎重に選びつつ、隠密の戦士たちは自らの位置を悟らせることなく、敵の隊列を密かに削ぎ落としてゆく。
fluff.ko: 그림자에 숨어 표적을 신중히 노리는 은밀한 전사들이 자신의 위치를 드러내지 않은 채 적진을 선별한다.
fluff.zh: 潜伏于阴影之中，审慎挑选猎物，隐秘的战士们在从未暴露自身位置的情况下，便已削减了敌军的阵列。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Phobos/Scout Squad unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete Phobos-/Scouttrupp-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
target.es: 1 unidad Phobos Escuadra de Exploradores amiga no trabada.
target.fr: Une unité de Phobos/Escouade Scout amie non engagée.
target.ja: 非接敵状態の味方フォボス/スカウト・スカッド・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 포보스/스카웃 분대 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态的己方恐惧型/侦察小队单位。

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
when.de: Zu Beginn der Bewegungsphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al inicio de la fase de movimiento del oponente.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Mouvement adverse.
when.it: All’inizio della fase di Movimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段开始时。

effect.en: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat bis zum Ende des Zugs -3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene +3" al alcance de detección hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr: Votre unité a -3" en portée de détection jusqu’à la fin du tour.
effect.it: La tua unità ha -3" alla distanza di individuazione fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja: そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到回合结束前，您的单位的侦测范围 -3"。

fluff.en: When still, silent and further masked by cameleoline materials or drifting smoke, a Chapter’s forward operatives are almost impossible to spot until it is too late.
fluff.de: Wenn die vorgelagerten Kämpfer eines Ordens bewegungslos unter ihren Chameolin-Umhängen oder hinter dichten Rauchschwaden verharren, ist es kaum möglich, sie zu entdecken, ehe es zu spät ist.
fluff.es: Cuando permanecen inmóviles, silenciosos y enmascarados por la camaleonina o el humo, los agentes de vanguardia de un Capítulo son casi imposibles de detectar hasta que es demasiado tarde.
fluff.fr: Lorsqu'ils sont immobiles, dissimulés par du caméléolin ou de la fumée, les agents d'avant-garde d'un Chapitre sont presque impossible à repérer avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.
fluff.it: Quando gli agenti d’avanguardia di un Capitolo si mantengono fermi, in silenzio e ulteriormente nascosti da vesti di cameleolina o coltri di fumo, sono praticamente impossibili da individuare finché non è troppo tardi.
fluff.ja: 身動きせず、物音も立てず、カメレオライン素材の外衣や煙幕で視認を阻まれた状態では、戦団の先遣隊員を捕捉することは極めて困難であり、発見した頃には手遅れの事態となっている。
fluff.ko: 챕터의 전진 요원들은 침묵 속에서 부동자세를 유지하며 카멜레올린 직물이나 흐르는 연기 속에 몸을 감춘다. 이들의 존재를 식별하기란 거의 불가능하다.
fluff.zh: 在保持静止并利用迷彩或烟幕的情况下，战团的先锋部队几乎无法被侦测到。

target.en: That <k>Phobos</k>/<k>Scout Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>フォボス</k>/<k>スカウト・スカッド</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>恐惧型</k>/<k>侦察小队</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Phobos/Scout Squad unit starts an action.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Phobos-/Scouttrupp-Einheit eine Aktion beginnt.
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Phobos/Escuadra de Exploradores amiga inicia una acción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Phobos/Escouade Scout amie entreprend une action.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Phobos/Squadra Esploratori amica inizia un’azione.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方フォボス/スカウト・スカッド・ユニットがアクションを開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 포보스/스카웃 분대 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작할 때
when.zh: 您的射击阶段中，在一个己方恐惧型/侦察小队单位开始一次行动时。

effect.en: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Aktion verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Esa acción no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Cette action n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quell’azione non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、そのアクションを行った場合でも、射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 특수 행동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次行动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Those warriors who operate far from Chapter reinforcement maintain their lethal fire even while conducting vital strategic operations.
fluff.de: Krieger, die weitab jeglicher Verstärkungen durch den Orden agieren, behalten ihren Beschuss selbst dann aufrecht, während sie wichtigen strategischen Operationen nachgehen.
fluff.es: Aquellos guerreros que operan lejos de los refuerzos del Capítulo mantienen su fuego letal mientras realizan operaciones estratégicas vitales.
fluff.fr: Les guerriers qui luttent loin des renforts du Chapitre savent maintenir un feu nourri tout en conduisant des opérations stratégiques vitales.
fluff.it: I guerrieri che operano lontani dai rinforzi capitolari mantengono una cadenza di tiro micidiale anche mentre conducono operazioni strategiche chiave.
fluff.ja: 戦団からの増援を望めぬ遠隔地で活動する戦士たちは、重要な戦略任務を遂行しつつも、その致命的な火力を維持する。
fluff.ko: 챕터의 지원과 멀리 떨어진 상태로 활동하는 전사들은, 필수 전략 작전을 수행하는 과정에서 확고한 사선을 유지한다.
fluff.zh: 远离战团增援部队的战士们能够在进行致命射击的同时执行重要的战略任务。

name.ja: 幸運の護りダイス（アップグレード）

description.en:
Speeder unit only. This unit can re-roll:
  • Damage rolls.
  • Rolls to determine the A of a weapon.
description.de:
Nur für eine Speeder-Einheit. Für diese Einheit können:
  • Schadenswürfe wiederholt werden.
  • Würfe zum Bestimmen der A einer Waffe wiederholt werden.
description.es:
Solo unidad Speeder. Esta unidad puede repetir sus:
  • Tiradas de daño.
  • Tiradas para determinar los A de un arma.
description.fr:
Unité de Speeder seulement. Cette unité peut relancer :
  • Les jets de Dégâts.
  • Les jets pour déterminer les A d’une arme.
description.it:
Solo unità di Speeder. Questa unità può ripetere:
  • I tiri per i danni.
  • I tiri per determinare la caratteristica A di un’arma.
description.ja:
スピーダー・兵のみ。このユニットは以下をリロールできる：
  • ダメージ量決定ロール。
  • 武器の【数】を決定する際のダイスロール。
description.ko:
스피더 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 다음 사항을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 피해 굴림
  • 무기의 공격 수치를 정하는 굴림
description.zh:
仅限速攻艇单位。该单位可以重掷：
  • 伤害掷骰。
  • 判断武器 A 时进行的掷骰。

name.ja: 破綻をもたらすもの（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Speeder</k> unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Speeder</k>-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben <k>[Deckung ignorieren]</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Speeder</k>. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
description.fr: Unité de <k>Speeder</k> seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Speeder</k>. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
description.ja: <k>スピーダー</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
description.ko: <k>스피더</k> 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>速攻艇</k>单位。该单位的远程武器拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

description.en: Infantry Phobos unit only. This unit’s attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 to hit rolls.
description.de: Nur für eine Phobos-Infanterie-Einheit. Attacken dieser Einheit gegen eine versteckte Einheit haben +1 auf Trefferwürfe.
description.es: Solo unidad Infantería/Phobos. Los ataques de esta unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad oculta tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
description.fr: Unité d’Infanterie Phobos seulement. Les attaques de cette unité qui ciblent une unité cachée ont +1 aux jets de touche.
description.it: Solo unità Phobos di Fanteria. Gli attacchi di questa unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità nascosta hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
description.ja: インファントリー・フォボス・ユニットのみ。このユニットの攻撃が隠密状態のユニットを対象としている場合、ヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 포보스 보병 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 공격이 은폐 상태인 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限步兵恐惧型单位。该单位攻击隐藏单位时的命中掷骰 +1。

description.en: <k>ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY</k> model only. This model has the following weapon:
description.de: Nur für ein <k>FLIEGENDES ADEPTUS</k>-<k>ASTARTES</k>-<k>INFANTERIE</k>-Modell. Dieses Modell hat folgende Waffe:
description.es: Solo miniatura <k>VOLADORA INFANTERÍA ADEPTUS ASTARTES</k>. Esta miniatura tiene esta arma:
description.fr: Figurine d’<k>INFANTERIE</k> de l’<k>ADEPTUS ASTARTES</k> avec le mot-clé <k>VOL</k> seulement. Cette figurine a l’arme suivante :
description.it: Solo modelli di <k>FANTERIA</k> degli <k>ADEPTUS ASTARTES</k> con <k>VOLARE</k>. Questo modello ha la seguente arma:
description.ja: <k>戦闘者・飛行・インファントリー</k>・兵のみ。この兵は以下の武器を持つ：
description.ko: <k>아뎁투스 아스타르테스 비행 보병</k> 모델 전용. 이 모델에 다음 무기를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>阿斯塔特修会飞行步兵</k>模型。该模型拥有以下武器：

description.en: ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY model only. When this unit ends an ingress move, select up to one enemy unit within 9" of this unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.
description.de: Nur für ein FLIEGENDES ADEPTUS-ASTARTES-INFANTERIE-Modell. Wenn diese Einheit eine Einsatzbewegung beendet, wähle bis zu eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 9" um diese Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
description.es: Solo miniatura VOLADORA INFANTERÍA ADEPTUS ASTARTES. Cuando esta unidad termina un movimiento de carga, elige una unidad enemiga a 9" o menos de esta unidad. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada.
description.fr: Figurine d’INFANTERIE de l’ADEPTUS ASTARTES avec le mot-clé VOL seulement. Quand cette unité finit un mouvement d’arrivée, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie à 9" ou moins d’elle. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
description.it: Solo modelli di FANTERIA degli ADEPTUS ASTARTES con VOLARE. Quando questa unità termina un movimento di inserzione, scegli fino a un’unità nemica entro 9" da questa unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi.
description.ja: 戦闘者・飛行・インファントリー・兵のみ。このユニットが突入移動を終了した時、このユニットの9mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 비행 보병 모델 전용. 이 유닛이 진입 이동을 종료할 때, 이 유닛의 9" 내에 있는 최대 한 개의 적 유닛을 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 값에는 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限阿斯塔特修会飞行步兵模型。当该单位结束一次入场移动时，选择最多一个位于该单位 9" 内的敌方单位。那个敌方单位必须进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰结果 -1。

description.en:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only (excluding Terminator models). (Once per turn per unit) In your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is unengaged, this unit can make a normal move of:
  • Up to D6".
  • Or: If this unit has the Divination Discipline ability, up to 6".
description.de:
Nur für ein Adeptus-Astartes-Psioniker-Modell (ausgenommen Terminator-Modelle). (Einmal pro Zug, pro Einheit) In der Bewegungsphase deines Gegners kann diese Einheit, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um sie beendet und sie nicht im Nahkampf ist, eine normale Bewegung:
  • von bis zu W6" ausführen.
  • oder: von bis zu 6", wenn deine Einheit die Fähigkeit Prophetie-­Disziplin hat.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Psíquico Adeptus Astartes (salvo Exterminador). (Una vez por turno, por unidad) En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termina un movimiento a 8" o menos de esta unidad, si esta unidad no está trabada, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de:
  • Hasta 1D6".
  • O: Si esta unidad tiene la habilidad Disciplina de la Adivinación, hasta 6".
description.fr:
Figurine de Psyker de l’Adeptus Astartes seulement (figurines de Terminator exclues). (Une fois par tour par unité) À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins de cette unité, si cette dernière est non engagée, elle peut faire un mouvement normal :
  • De D6" maximum.
  • Ou : Si cette unité a l’aptitude Discipline de Divination, de 6" maximum.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Psionico degli Adeptus Astartes (tranne modelli di Terminator). (Una volta per turno per unità) Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da questa unità, se è non ingaggiata, questa unità può effettuare un movimento normale di:
  • Massimo D6".
  • Oppure:se questa unità ha l’abilità Disciplina della Divinazione, di massimo 6".
description.ja:
戦闘者・サイカー・兵のみ（ターミネイター・兵を除く）。（ユニットごとに、各ターンにつき1回）敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、このユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入るような位置で移動を終了した時、このユニットが非接敵状態ならば、このユニットは以下のように通常移動を行える：
  • 最大D6mvまで。
  • または：このユニットが『予見体系』アビリティを持つ場合、最大6mvまで。
description.ko:
아뎁투스 아스타르테스 사이커 모델(터미네이터 모델 제외) 전용(유닛마다 턴당 한 번). 상대의 이동 페이즈에, 적 유닛이 이 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때, 이 유닛이 교전 상태가 아니라면, 이 유닛이 다음 거리만큼 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
  • 최대 D6"
  • 또는, 이 유닛이 예지 학파 능력을 보유하고 있다면, 최대 6".
description.zh:
仅限阿斯塔特修会灵能者模型（终结者模型除外）。（每个单位，每回合限一次）在对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在该单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时，如果该单位不处于交战状态，那么该单位可以进行一次：
  • 最多 D6" 的常规移动。
  • 或者：如果该单位拥有预知学派技能，则可以进行最多 6" 的常规移动。

description.en:
Phobos model only. This model has:
  • Lone Operative.
  • Stealth.
description.de:
Nur für ein Phobos-Modell. Dieses Modell hat:
  • Einsamer Wolf.
