  • Tarnung.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Phobos. Esta miniatura tiene:
  • Agente solitario.
  • Sigilo.
description.fr:
Figurine de Phobos seulement. Cette figurine a :
  • Agent Solitaire.
  • Discrétion.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Phobos. Questo modello ha:
  • Agente Solitario.
  • Furtività.
description.ja:
フォボス・兵のみ。この兵は：
  • 単独工作員である。
  • 隠密能力を持つ。
description.ko:
포보스 모델 전용. 이 모델에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • 단독 요원.
  • 스텔스.
description.zh:
仅限恐惧型模型。该模型拥有：
  • 独行特工。
  • 隐匿。

description.en:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only.
  • Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks.
  • If this unit has the Telepathy Discipline ability, this unit has ‑3" detection range.
description.de:
Nur für ein Adeptus-Astartes-Psioniker-Modell.
  • Feindliche Einheiten können gegen diese Einheit keine Eiliger-Beschuss-Attacken ausführen.
  • Wenn diese Einheit die Fähigkeit Telepathie-Disziplin hat, hat sie ‑3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Psíquico Adeptus Astartes.
  • Las unidades enemigas no pueden tomar esta unidad como blanco de ataques de disparos repentinos.
  • Si esta unidad tiene la habilidad Disciplina de la Telepatía, esta unidad tiene -3 al alcance de detección.
description.fr:
Figurine de Psyker de l’Adeptus Astartes seulement.
  • Les unités ennemies ne peuvent pas cibler cette unité avec des attaques de tir au jugé.
  • Si cette unité a l’aptitude Discipline de Télépathie, elle a ‑3" en portée de détection.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Psionico degli Adeptus Astartes.
  • Le unità nemiche non possono scegliere questa unità come bersaglio di attacchi tiro improvviso.
  • Se questa unità ha l’abilità Disciplina della Telepatia, ha ‑3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja:
戦闘者・サイカー・兵のみ。
  • 敵ユニットは即応射撃で、このユニットを攻撃対象にすることはできない。
  • このユニットが『精神感応体系』アビリティを持つ場合、このユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko:
아뎁투스 아스타르테스 사이커 모델 전용.
  • 적 유닛이 이 유닛을 스냅 샷 공격의 대상으로 지정할 수 없습니다.
  • 이 유닛이 감응 학파 능력을 보유하고 있다면, 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh:
仅限阿斯塔特修会灵能者模型。
  • 敌方单位无法将该单位选为快速射击的攻击目标。
  • 如果该单位拥有感应学派技能，那么该单位的侦测范围 -3"。

description.en:
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER** model only.
▪ If this unit has the **Telekinesis Discipline** ability, this unit has **Deep Strike**.
▪ At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if this unit is **unengaged**, you can use this ability. If you do:
▪ Place this unit in **strategic reserves**.
▪ This unit can make an **ingress move** in your next Movement phase (including in your first turn).
description.de:
Nur für ein Adeptus-Astartes-Psioniker-Modell.
  • Wenn diese Einheit die Fähigkeit Telekinese-Disziplin hat, hat sie Schocktruppen.
  • Wenn diese Einheit am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners nicht im Nahkampf ist, kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust:
    • Versetze diese Einheit in die strategische Reserve.
    • Diese Einheit kann in deiner nächsten Bewegungsphase eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen (auch in deinem ersten Zug).
description.es:
Solo miniatura Psíquico Adeptus Astartes.
  • Si esta unidad tiene la habilidad Disciplina de la Telequinesis, tiene Despliegue rápido.
  • Al final de la fase de combate del oponente, si esta unidad no está trabada, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces:
    • Coloca tu unidad en la reserva estratégica.
    • En tu siguiente fase de movimiento (incluido tu primer turno), esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento de inserción.
description.fr:
Figurine de PSYKER de l'ADEPTUS ASTARTES seulement.
  • Si cette unité a l’aptitude Discipline de Télékinésie, elle a Frappe en Profondeur.
  • À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse, si cette unité est non engagée, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas:
    • Placez cette unité en réserve stratégique.
    • Cette unité peut faire un mouvement d'arrivée à votre prochaine phase de Mouvement (y compris à votre premier tour).
description.it:
Solo modelli di Psionico degli Adeptus Astartes
  • Se questa unità ha l’abilità Disciplina della Telecinesi, ha Attacco in Profondità.
  • Puoi usare questa abilità alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell'avversario, se questa unità è non ingaggiata. Se lo fai:
    • Colloca questa unità nelle riserve strategiche.
    • Nella tua successiva fase di Movimento questa unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione (anche nel tuo primo turno).
description.ja:
戦闘者・サイカー・兵のみ。
  • このユニットが『念力体系』 アビリティを持つ場合、このユニットは『縦深攻撃』を持つ。
  • 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時、このユニットが非接敵状態である場合、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合：
    • このユニットを戦略的予備兵力に配置する。
    • このユニットは、次の自軍側移動フェイズ中に突入移動を行える（自軍側の最初のターン中でも）。
description.ko:
아뎁투스 아스타르테스 사이커 모델 전용.
  • 이 유닛이 염동 학파 능력을 보유하고 있다면, 이 유닛에 심층 타격을 부여합니다.
  • 상대의 백병전 페이즈 종료 시, 이 유닛이 교전 상태가 아니라면 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 다음을 적용합니다.
    • 이 유닛을 전략 예비대에 넣습니다.
    • 플레이어의 다음 이동 페이즈에 이 유닛은 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다(플레이어의 첫 번째 턴에도 가능).
description.zh:
仅限阿斯塔特灵能者模型。
  • 如果该单位拥有念动学派技能，那么该单位拥有深入打击。
  • 在您对手的近战阶段结束时，如果该单位不处于交战状态，您可以使用该技能。若使用：
    • 将该单位放入战略预备队。
    • 该单位可以在您的下一个移动阶段中进行一次入场移动（即使在您的首回合中）。

description.en:
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER** model only. This unit’s ranged attacks have:
▪ **[LETHAL HITS]**.
▪ If this unit has the **Pyromancy Discipline** ability, **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**.
description.de:
Nur für ein Adeptus-Astartes-Psioniker-Modell. Die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben:
  • [TÖDLICHE TREFFER].
  • [Trefferhagel 1], wenn diese Einheit die Fähigkeit Pyromantie-Disziplin hat.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Psíquico Adeptus Astartes. Los ataques [Psíquicos] de esta miniatura:
  • [GOLPES SOSTENIDOS].
  • Si esta unidad tiene la habilidad Disciplina de la Piromancia, [GOLPES SOSTENIDOS 1].
description.fr:
Figurine de PSYKER de l'ADEPTUS ASTARTES seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont:
  • [TOUCHES FATALES].
  • Si cette unité a l’aptitude Discipline de Pyromancie, elles ont [TOUCHES SOUTENUES 1].
description.it:
Solo modelli di Psionico degli Adeptus Astartes. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno:
  • [COLPI LETALI ].
  • [SCARICADI COLPI 1] se questa unità ha l'abilità Disciplina di Piromanzia.
description.ja:
戦闘者・サイカー・兵のみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は以下を持つ：
  • ［会心ヒット］。
  • このユニットが『焔術体系』アビリティを持つ場合、［連続命中1］を持つ。
description.ko:
아뎁투스 아스타르테스 사이커 모델 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • [살상타]를 부여합니다.
  • 이 유닛이 염화 학파 능력을 보유하고 있다면, [연타 1]을 부여합니다.’
description.zh:
仅限阿斯塔特灵能者模型。该单位的远程攻击拥有：
  • [致命一击]。
  • 如果该单位拥有烈焰学派技能，则还拥有[连击 1]。

description.en:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only.
  • When this unit is selected to make an advance move, that move does not prevent this unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
  • When this unit is selected to make a fall‑back move, if this unit has the Biomancy Discipline ability, that move does not prevent this unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
description.de: Nur für ein Adeptus-Astartes-Psioniker-Modell. Wenn diese Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrückenbewegung auszuführen, verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass diese Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen. Wenn diese Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, und die Fähigkeit Biomantie-Disziplin hat, verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass diese Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Psíquico Adeptus Astartes.
  • Cuando esta unidad se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar, esto no le impide ser apta para declarar cargas.
  • Cuando esta unidad se elija para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, si esta unidad tiene la habilidad Disciplina de la Biomancia, este movimiento no le impide ser apta para declarar cargas.
description.fr:
Figurine de Psyker de l’Adeptus Astartes seulement.
  • Quand cette unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance, ce dernier ne l’empêche pas d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
  • Quand cette unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, si elle a l’aptitude Discipline de Biomancie, ce mouvement de retraite ne l’empêche pas d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Psionico degli Adeptus Astartes.
  • Quando questa unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata, quel movimento non impedisce a questa unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
  • Quando questa unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento, se questa unità ha l’abilità Disciplina della Biomanzia, quel movimento non impedisce a questa unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
description.ja:
戦闘者・サイカー・兵のみ。
  • このユニットが全力移動を行った場合でも、このユニットは突撃を宣言可能である。
  • このユニットが 退却移動を行った場合でも、このユニットが 『生体秘法体系』アビリティを持つ場合、このユニットは突撃を宣言できる。
description.ko:
아뎁투스 아스타르테스 사이커 모델 전용.
  • 이 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 급속 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
  • 이 유닛이 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 이 유닛이 생동 학파 능력을 보유하고 있다면, 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
description.zh:
仅限阿斯塔特修会灵能者模型。
  • 当该单位被选择进行一次突进移动时，那次移动不会阻止该单位宣布冲锋。
  • 在该单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，如果该单位拥有生物学派技能，那么那次移动不会阻止该单位宣布冲锋。

description.en: **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

**CAPTAIN** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, instead of selecting a Combat Doctrine to be active for your army, you can select the Tactical Doctrine. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for the bearer’s unit only, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine to be active for your army this battle.

**PHOBOS** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer’s unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

**PHOBOS** model only. The bearer has the following ability:

**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a **stratagem**, you can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that **stratagem** by 1CP.

**GRAVIS** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

**CAPTAIN** model only. Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker on the battlefield within 12" of the centre of the first marker, then draw a straight line between the centre of each of these markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Both markers are then removed.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability while they are within range of an objective marker you control and, while that unit is Battle-shocked, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit instead of changing it to 0.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

**TECHMARINE** model only. In your Command phase, select one **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by that **VEHICLE** model have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

**TECHMARINE** model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. In your Command phase, select one **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that **VEHICLE** is eligible to shoot even if it Fell Back or Advanced this turn.

**TACTICUS** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to their characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for them (excluding modifiers to saving throws).
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** model only. If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of Torrent weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES ANCIENT** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

**PHOBOS** model only. The bearer has the following ability:

**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a **stratagem**, you can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that **stratagem** by 1CP.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. In your Movement phase, if the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle‐shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle‐shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re‐roll Advance rolls made for that unit.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** model only. If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the start of your next Command phase, the Tactical Doctrine is active for this unit (instead of any other Combat Doctrine you select to be active for your army, and even if there is no Combat Doctrine active for your army).

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. You can re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR** model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer and **BATTLELINE** models in the bearer’s unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, the bearer has the **BATTLELINE** keyword.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer and **BATTLELINE** models in the bearer’s unit by 1.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer’s unit has the **BATTLELINE** keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. In the Battle‑shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of the bearer, that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

When this unit **declares a charge**, if an enemy unit within range of an **objective** is within 12" of this unit, you can use this **enhancement**. If you do:

• This unit can re-roll that **charge roll**.
• This unit <u>must</u> end that **charge move engaged** with one or more of those enemy units.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

**GRAVIS** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Fall Back move, select one of the following to apply to that unit until the end of the turn:

■ That unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back.
■ That unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any **HEAVY TRANSPORT** it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. If the bearer starts the battle embarked within a **TRANSPORT**, that **TRANSPORT** has the Scouts 6" ability.

fluff.en: Cloak billowing in the heat of battle and absolvor pistol flaring, Chaplains stride purposefully into battle, the boom of their oration audible even over the furious din of conflict. Without rest they exhort their brothers to victory, steeling their hearts, minds and souls no matter the savagery of the enemy.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **ASSAULT SQUAD** ■ **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **CRUSADER SQUAD** ■ **DEATH COMPANY MARINES** ■ **DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLT RIFLES** ■ **DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLTGUNS** ■ **DEATHWATCH VETERANS** ■ **DECIMUS KILL TEAM** ■ **FORTIS KILL TEAM** ■ **HELLBLASTER SQUAD** ■ **INFERNUS SQUAD** ■ **INNER CIRCLE COMPANIONS** ■ **INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **SWORD BRETHREN** ■ **TACTICAL SQUAD** ■ **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **WOLF GUARD**

While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 6.

wargear.en: This model’s storm bolter can be replaced with 1 relic shield.

fluff.en: Every Space Marine is roused to war by the litanies of their Chaplains, and never is this spiritual fortification more vital than amidst the blood and horror of boarding actions and beachhead strikes. Thus, Chaplains are trained to wear formidable Terminator armour so they can fight alongside Veteran battle-brothers.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **DEATHWATCH TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **DEATHWING COMMAND SQUAD** ■ **DEATHWING KNIGHTS** ■ **DEATHWING TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **RELIC TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD** ■ **TERMINATOR SQUAD**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Each time this model’s unit is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability when targeting that enemy unit.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** absolvor bolt pistol; twin bolt rifle; crozius arcanum.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: When a Chaplain takes to the field on a Raider-pattern bike, he is able to keep pace with even the swiftest armoured advance or spearhead breakthrough. Fighting in such an action, he will urge his brothers to victory as he bellows his catechisms and charges headlong into the foe, crozius arcanum swinging.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **BIKE SQUAD** ■ **COMPANY VETERANS ON BIKES** ■ **OUTRIDER SQUAD** ■ **RAVENWING BLACK KNIGHTS**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; crozius arcanum.

wargear.en: This model’s bolt pistol can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 boltgun ◦ 1 combi-weapon ◦ 1 grav-pistol ◦ 1 hand flamer ◦ 1 inferno pistol ◦ 1 plasma pistol ◦ 1 storm bolter ◦ 1 power fist • 1 Absolvor Bolt Pistol

fluff.en: Ever are the roared litanies of the Chaplains needed all over the battlefield, to stir the hearts of battle-brothers and drive fear into the enemy. With a jump pack a Chaplain can thunder to wherever he is most needed, or spearhead furious assaults into the enemy’s positions himself.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSORS WITH JUMP PACKS** ■ **ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS** ■ **DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH BOLTGUNS AND JUMP PACKS** ■ **DEATH COMPANY MARINES WITH JUMP PACKS** ■ **SKYCLAWS** ■ **TALONSTRIKE KILL TEAM** ■ **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS**

name.en: Storm of the Emperor’s Wrath – Focused witchfire
Storm of the Emperor’s Wrath – Witchfire

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

▪ This unit has **Stealth**.
▪ Melee attacks that target this unit have ‐1 to **hit rolls**.
▪ (Once per battle round, per army) When you target this unit with the **Counteroffensive**/**Fire Overwatch**/**Heroic Intervention** **stratagem**, that use is ‐1 CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Storm of the Emperor’s Wrath; Rod of Tigurius.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: As Tigurius charges into battle, he assails the enemy with a tempest of psychic fury. Blasts of energy leap from his staff, hurling foes through the air and burning their souls to ash. It is the Chief Librarian’s acute foresight that is most valuable to his Chapter – his merest intuition is worth more than the predictions of an army of strategists and spies.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **ASSAULT SQUAD** ■ **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **DESOLATION SQUAD** ■ **DEVASTATOR SQUAD** ■ **INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **TACTICAL SQUAD** ■ **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**

description.en: While this unit contains an Ancient, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.
While a **CHARACTER** model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

loadout.en:
**The Ancient is equipped with:** bolt pistol; bolt rifle; close combat weapon.
**The Company Champion is equipped with:** bolt pistol; master-crafted power weapon.
**One Company Veteran is equipped with:** bolt pistol; master-crafted heavy bolter; close combat weapon.
**One Company Veteran is equipped with:** bolt pistol; master-crafted bolt rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A company’s most heroic battle-brothers fight alongside a Chapter’s high-ranking officers. These veterans and specialists serve as honour guards and provide vital support to a commander. Company Champions defend their Company’s honour with martial excellence, Ancients guard its inspirational banners and Company Veterans lay down hails of fire from relic bolt weapons.

description.en: Each time an attack targets this model’s unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-**CHARACTER** models in **TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD** and **TERMINATOR SQUAD** units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 1 Fist of Dorn.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Raising high his storm shield, Rampart, as he swings the Fist of Dorn, Lysander wades through his foes like a warship smashing through stormy seas. Each hammer blow reduces enemies to bloody ruin, sweeping whole ranks of warriors from their feet. All the while, Lysander’s obstinate scowl never wavers, his determination absolute.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **RELIC TERMINATOR SQUAD** ■ **TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD** ■ **TERMINATOR SQUAD**

description.en: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; castellan launcher; superfrag rocket launcher; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: The Desolation Sergeant’s superfrag rocket launcher or superkrak rocket launcher can be replaced with 1 vengor launcher.
All of the models in this unit can each have their superfrag rocket launcher replaced with 1 superkrak rocket launcher.

fluff.en: Desolation Marines specialise in unleashing widespread devastation throughout the enemy ranks. Whether direct-firing warheads into massed infantry or enemy armour, or raining salvoes down upon the enemy with their castellan launchers, these warriors reap a grievous toll amongst the foe.

description.en: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

Once per battle, after making a Hit roll for a model in this unit, you can change that roll to an unmodified 6.

***Designer’s Note:** Place an Armorium Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; boltgun; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: The Devastator Sergeant’s bolt pistol and boltgun can be replaced with two different weapons from the following list:* ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword ◦ 1 bolt pistol ◦ 1 boltgun ◦ 1 combi-weapon ◦ 1 grav-pistol ◦ 1 plasma pistol ◦ 1 power fist ◦ 1 power weapon ◦ 1 thunder hammer  * This model can only be equipped with two ranged weapons if one of them is a Pistol (and it can only have one Pistol)
Up to 4 Devastator Marines can each have their boltgun replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 grav-cannon ◦ 1 heavy bolter ◦ 1 lascannon ◦ 1 missile launcher ◦ 1 multi-melta ◦ 1 plasma cannon

fluff.en: Devastator Squads pound the enemy at long range with overwhelming heavy weapons fire, annihilating any caught in the ferocious blasts. Once they have secured the perfect firing position, they hold it firmly, providing their battle-brothers with intense covering fire as they advance.

description.en: While a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** assault cannon; storm bolter; Dreadnought combat weapon.

wargear.en: This model’s Dreadnought combat weapon and storm bolter can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 missile launcher and 1 close combat weapon ◦ 1 heavy flamer and 1 Dreadnought combat weapon
This model’s assault cannon can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 heavy plasma cannon ◦ 1 multi-melta ◦ 1 twin lascannon

fluff.en: Dreadnoughts are bipedal combat walkers piloted by centuries-old fallen heroes of the Chapter, kept alive by esoteric technologies in an ancient sarcophagus at the Dreadnought’s heart. Equipped with devastating heavy weapons, they can annihilate the enemy from afar or crush them to paste in brutal melee.

description.en: This model must start the battle in Reserves and can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 8" away from all enemy models.
Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has been set up on the battlefield, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
Once this unit is set up on the battlefield and all units within it have disembarked, until the end of the battle, units cannot embark within this **TRANSPORT.**

*The highlighted portions of this model are the only parts that are considered to make up its hull. Models can be set up or end a move on any part of this model that is not highlighted in red. If any models are on non-highlighted sections of this model when it is destroyed, place those models as close to their original position as possible, on the battlefield, after removing this model.*

wargear.en: None

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **CENTURION**, **GRAVIS**, **JUMP PACK**, **WULFEN** or **TERMINATOR** models.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it contains an Eliminator Sergeant equipped with an instigator bolt carbine, this unit can make a Normal move. If it does so, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.
Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; bolt sniper rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: All Eliminators in this unit can each have their bolt sniper rifle replaced with 1 las fusil.
The Eliminator Sergeant’s bolt sniper rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 instigator bolt carbine ◦ 1 las fusil

fluff.en: Eliminator Squads are peerless assassins, deadly marksmen who haunt the shadows of the battlefield unseen by the enemy. For hours they will lie in wait to take the perfect shot, their sophisticated scopes feeding them essential data to ensure they never fail to make the kill.

description.en: Each time a ranged attack made by a model in this unit targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** model, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; melta rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 3 models in this unit, 1 Eradicator’s melta rifle can be replaced with 1 multi-melta.

fluff.en: Before the molten ire of an Eradicator Squad, heavy armour and defended positions stand little chance. Eradicators wear the heavier Gravis-pattern of Mk X power armour, allowing them to stride unharmed through waves of incoming fire before bringing their own destructive weaponry to bear at close range.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, when this unit is **selected to shoot** you can select one non-**MONSTER/VEHICLE** enemy unit **visible** to it. While making attacks, this unit’s heavy bolters that targeted that selected unit have **[BLAST 1]**.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** 1 bolt pistol; 1 heavy bolter; 1 close‑combat weapon

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The heavy Mk X Gravis armour of these fire support specialists allows them to weather storms of incoming projectiles. Standing firm, they return fire with their brutal heavy bolters, scything down enemy infantry and blowing apart the foe’s light armoured vehicles with well‑placed shots to weak spots in their targets’ hulls.

description.en: Each time you select this unit for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ when resolving that Stratagem.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** twin Firestrike las-talon; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their twin Firestrike las-talon replaced with 1 twin Firestrike autocannon.

fluff.en: Primarily a defensive weapon, the Firestrike Servo-turret lays down withering volleys of fire to secure flanks or the Space Marines’ base of operations. Mounted on gravitic ventral plates, they can hover across the battlefield to ideal firing positions from which to slaughter attacking enemies.

description.en: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Lancer laser destroyer; 2 storm bolters; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with 1 ironhail heavy stubber.
This model’s 2 storm bolters can be replaced with 2 fragstorm grenade launchers.

fluff.en: With pinpoint accuracy, the Gladiator Lancer picks off the heaviest enemy armour, laser destroyer punching smouldering holes in their hulls. Such is the range of its heavy cannon that it can eliminate threats to the Space Marines before they encounter them, storming past burning wrecks to claim their objectives.

description.en: This model’s twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability when targeting **INFANTRY** units.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 tempest bolters; twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with 1 ironhail heavy stubber.

fluff.en: When the cannons of the Gladiator Reaper spin to full pitch, the droning makes the teeth of all nearby itch with the intensity of the vibrations. Within seconds, thousands of spent casings pour over the battle tank’s armoured hide as enemies are erased from existence by the storm of fire.

description.en: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin las-talon that targets the closest eligible **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 multi-meltas; twin las-talon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with 1 ironhail heavy stubber.

fluff.en: The Valiant lays down blistering volleys of fire as it escorts transports or supports infantry in ferocious fighting, crossing rushing watercourses, sucking marshlands and bubbling lava lakes with equal ease. Its twin las-talons spit death at the foe, making short work of enemy armour and cracking open fortified positions.

description.en:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more **FORTIFICATIONS** from your army:

■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **FORTIFICATION**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

You can target this **FORTIFICATION** with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted another unit with that Stratagem this turn. This **FORTIFICATION** can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Hammerfall heavy bolter array; Hammerfall missile launcher.

wargear.en: This model’s Hammerfall heavy bolter array can be replaced with 1 Hammerfall heavy flamer array.

fluff.en: Hammerfall Bunkers are launched from Space Marine warships in the same manner as Drop Pods. Automated area-denial assets crewed by hard-wired servitors, they have all kinds of battlefield roles, including securing beachheads, hampering enemy assaults and wreaking havoc behind the foe’s lines.

name.en: Unyielding in the Face of the Foe

description.en: While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time an attack with a Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a model in this unit, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; heavy bolt rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Heavy Intercessor’s heavy bolt rifle can be replaced with 1 heavy bolter.

fluff.en: Clad in thick Gravis armour, Heavy Intercessors secure ground and are immovable in the defence. Always ready for any sign of enemy counter-attack, they stand firm, laying down volleys of heavy fire that keep all but the most determined or foolhardy enemies at bay.

description.en:
Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can shoot after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play. When resolving these attacks, any Hazardous tests taken for that attack are automatically passed.

***Designer’s Note:** This ability is triggered even when a model in this unit is destroyed as the result of failing a Hazardous test, meaning such a model may be able to shoot twice in the same phase.*

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; plasma incinerator; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: The Hellblaster Sergeant’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.

fluff.en: Few foes can survive the incandescent fury of a Hellblaster Squad. Whether they be Tyranid Hive Tyrant, Ork Warboss or Heretic Astartes battle tank, all are reduced to ash and slag by searing, well-aimed plasma fire pouring from the Hellblasters’ ferocious weapons.

description.en: Units can disembark from this **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.
The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.
While a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 storm bolters; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 bellicatus missile array ◦ 1 ironhail skytalon array ◦ 1 orbital comms array ◦ 1 shield dome
This model’s 2 storm bolters can be replaced with 2 fragstorm grenade launchers.
This model can be equipped with 1 ironhail heavy stubber.

fluff.en: Equipped with vectored thrusters that make it faster than any other gravitic tank in the Space Marines’ armouries, the Impulsor is a highly adaptable transport used by all Primaris Space Marines for rapid insertion and flanking manoeuvres. It is particularly favoured by Vanguard forces.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 7 **TACTICUS** or **PHOBOS INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **JUMP PACK** models.

description.en: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a meteoric descent. If it does, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** assault bolters; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: All models in this unit can each have their assault bolters replaced with 1 plasma exterminators.

fluff.en: Equipped with heavy jump packs, Inceptor Squads are superb spearhead troops that deliver overwhelming blows to the enemy. Plummeting to the surface from the very edge of a world’s atmosphere, they strike with devastating force, unleashing a hurricane of fire that turns whole squads of enemy infantry to bloody mist.

description.en: Each time this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit within 3" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a **VEHICLE** unit.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; occulus bolt carbine; paired combat blades.

wargear.en: One Incursor can be equipped with 1 haywire mine

fluff.en: Aggressive light infantry, Incursors specialise in storming enemy defences and destroying essential assets. With a formidable array of auspexes and sensory equipment, they can see their enemies through walls and predict their movements – and with a burst of carbine fire or knife thrusts, cut them down.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, you can select one enemy **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a pyreblaster. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; pyreblaster; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Infernus Squads purge swathes of the enemy ranks with the incandescent firestorms they unleash from their pyreblasters. They are close-assault specialists, sending jets of burning promethium into enemy trench lines and bunkers, and through dense ruins and concealing vegetation, ensuring no foe escapes their fiery wrath.

description.en: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.
Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; marksman bolt carbine; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: * These options cannot be taken on the same model.
1 Infiltrator can be equipped with 1 Infiltrator comms array.*
1 Infiltrator can be equipped with 1 helix gauntlet.*

fluff.en: Infiltrator Squads are experts in covert operations and are drilled extensively in self-sufficiency and survival skills. Equipped with omni-scramblers that cripple enemy communications, they wreak havoc amongst their foes before cutting them down with hails of accurate bolt fire.

description.en: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

In your Shooting phase, when this unit is **selected to shoot**, select up to one **visible** enemy unit. While making those attacks, this unit’s Bolt Rifle attacks that targeted that enemy unit have +2 **A.**

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; bolt rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 model equipped with a bolt rifle can be equipped with 1 Astartes grenade launcher.
The Intercessor Sergeant’s close combat weapon can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword ◦ 1 power fist ◦ 1 power weapon ◦ 1 thunder hammer
The Intercessor Sergeant’s bolt rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword ◦ 1 hand flamer ◦ 1 plasma pistol ◦ 1 power weapon

fluff.en: Intercessor Squads are capable of laying down punishing fire while advancing or holding ground against the enemy. They have access to a range of bolt weaponry suited to varied battlefield assignments, from engaging enemies at long range to cleansing bunker complexes.

description.en: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when another friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; twin bolt rifle; onslaught gatling cannon; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: This model’s onslaught gatling cannon can be replaced with 1 multi-melta.

fluff.en: The Invader is a highly flexible all-terrain vehicle, perfectly adapted to an aggressive reconnaissance role. Outfitted with either a multi-melta or onslaught gatling cannon, it can rapidly deliver punishing fire against vulnerable parts of the enemy line, or swiftly engage and destroy scouting elements of opposing forces.

description.en: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES PHOBOS INFANTRY** unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, this model can use this ability. If it does, after that enemy model’s unit has finished making its attacks, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** fragstorm grenade launcher; heavy bolter; incendium cannon; twin ironhail heavy stubber; Invictor fist.

wargear.en: This model’s incendium cannon can be replaced with 1 twin ironhail autocannon.

fluff.en: Outfitted with silent reactors and servos, the Invictor Tactical Warsuit is a combat walker ideally suited to support Vanguard operations and function independently from a main Space Marine strike force. In battle they are piloted by hand-picked warriors dedicated to defending their battle-brothers.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** units, it has the Lone Operative ability.

In your Command phase, select one friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to 3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that **VEHICLE** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. You cannot select a unit for this ability that has already been selected for the Blessing of the Omnissiah ability this phase, and vice versa.

If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-**CHARACTER** models in **HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD** units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 3 while they are not Battle-shocked.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Gorgon’s Wrath; Harrowhand; Medusan manipuli.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Malkaan Feirros is amongst the oldest and wisest of the Iron Fathers. Yet his radical beliefs and wry humour leaven his arcane technological pronouncements. The Primarch’s strategic brilliance is his greatest weapon, however, his enemies outmanoeuvred and out-thought before the battle has even begun.

description.en: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy models, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; boltgun; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Scout’s boltgun can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 heavy bolter ◦ 1 missile launcher

The Scout Sergeant’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 Astartes chainsword.

fluff.en: Space Marine neophytes, Scouts learn their deadly craft in daring missions independent of the main force. Led by seasoned Veteran Sergeants, they infiltrate enemy positions, clear potential drop zones, set ambushes, sabotage supply lines and complete all manner of other objectives to weaken the foe.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Sternguard bolt pistol; Sternguard bolt rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Sternguard Veteran’s Sternguard bolt rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 pyrecannon ◦ 1 Sternguard heavy bolter
Any number of models can each have their Sternguard bolt rifle replaced with 1 combi-weapon.

The Sternguard Veteran Sergeant’s Sternguard bolt rifle can be replaced with one of the following:  ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword  ◦ 1 combi-weapon ◦ 1 power weapon ◦ 1 power fist ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword and 1 Sternguard bolt rifle* ◦ 1 power weapon and 1 Sternguard bolt rifle* ◦ 1 power fist and 1 Sternguard bolt rifle*  * This model’s Sternguard bolt rifle cannot be replaced.

fluff.en: Sternguard Veterans are possessed of an unshakeable calm, and are renowned amongst their brothers for their exemplary marksmanship in the fiercest battles. Proficient in all of the Chapter’s ranged weaponry, they can always be found where their pinpoint volleys will best shatter the foe.

description.en: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 fragstorm grenade launchers; onslaught gatling cannon; twin ironhail heavy stubber; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Hailstrike is so heavily armed that it can annihilate entire swathes of infantry in fusillades of blistering projectiles. Speeding over the battlefield, its specialised loadout shatters charging formations and shreds barricades and defences.

description.en: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Hammerstrike missile launcher; 2 krakstorm grenade launchers; melta destroyer; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Hammerstrike excels at rooting out enemies from trench and bunker networks. Sweeping low over the battlefield, it employs searing melta blasts and volleys of rockets to crack the foe’s defence lines wide open.

description.en: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Thunderstrikes outmanoeuvre the foe at every turn, targeting vulnerable points in armour, fuel stores and missile hoppers to turn tanks into raging fireballs. Just a single Thunderstrike is capable of destroying armoured breakthrough attempts, and when one is on the battlefield, few enemies are safe.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can **FLY**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** twin assault cannon; skyhammer missile launcher; las-talon; armoured hull.

fluff.en: Stormhawk Interceptors are high-altitude fighter craft designed solely for achieving aerial supremacy. Dropped from mag-cradles aboard orbiting craft, these ceramite-plated vehicles engage enemy air assets in brutal dogfights and are protected by countermeasures that launch blazing flares.

description.en: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The Stormraven superbly combines the role of reliable combat drop-ship and deadly aerial combatant. A capacious troop bay and thick layers of armour allow it to effectively transport squads of Space Marines – and, thanks to its magna-grapples, even a Dreadnought – into the very heart of battle.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** models and 1 **DREADNOUGHT** model. Each **JUMP PACK**, **WULFEN**, **GRAVIS** or **TERMINATOR** model takes up the space of 2 models and each **CENTURION** model takes up the space of 3 models.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot **FLY**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Fast and manoeuvrable, the Stormtalon is an aerial interceptor optimised for escorting Stormraven Gunships. While fast enough to engage in aerial combat, its pilot can switch on the Stormtalon’s repulsor systems, making it agile enough to closely support infantry in defence or on the attack.

description.en: This model’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If that unit is already eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit instead.
Each time a model in this model’s unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: A true son of Chogoris, Suboden Khan commands the White Scars First Brotherhood from the saddle of his grav bike, Thunder. A master of cavalry warfare, he leads his forces in epic hunts and sweeping advances, smashing through enemy lines and ruthlessly running down fleeing foes.

Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Girded in armour that can tolerate the vicious recoil of their weapons and the terrible stresses of grav-drops, Suppressors rapidly take up key positions on the battlefield. From there, they unleash deluges of armour-piercing rounds that decimate enemy infantry and force the survivors to dive for cover.

fluff.en: Tactical Squads have formed the backbone of Space Marine Chapters for ten thousand years. With access to a wide range of weapons, they can purge swathes of enemy infantry, scour battlefields clean of heavily armoured foes or punch burning holes through tanks.

description.en: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

In your Command phase, you can select one friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that **VEHICLE** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.
If a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE** model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Omnissian power axe has an Attacks characteristic of 7.

fluff.en: Techmarines stride selflessly through oncoming fire to soothe the machine spirits of wounded war engines, deftly peeling back damaged armour plates to repair burnt-out cabling and bending warped panels back into shape with their servo- arms and mechadendrites.

description.en: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 8" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.
At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-shock test.
The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

fluff.en: Terminator Assault Squads are armed with devastating close-combat weaponry perfect for ferocious assaults and savage boarding actions. They rush to engage the enemy’s greatest warriors, shredding the foe with lightning claws or shattering their skulls with thunder hammers.

fluff.en: Terminator armour is a marvel of technology that enables its wearer to survive almost anything, from the stresses of teleportation to earth-shaking artillery bombardments. So equipped, Terminator Squads can appear in the midst of the foe or stride unstoppably across the field towards them, firing their weapons all the while.

description.en: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: Thunderhawk Gunships have served the Space Marines with distinction since the Great Crusade, combining the roles of orbital troop lander, heavy gunship and medium bomber. Thunderhawks are formidably armed for their size, with a main gun derived from frigate-class warships and a host of additional weapons.

fluff.en: Shot after shot bounces from the indomitable plate of Tor Garadon’s Gravis armour as he advances across the battlefield. Sharp-minded and possessing a knack for improvised warfare, Garadon directs the lethal fire of his warriors through a combination of natural skill and the advanced targeting data fed to him by his signum array.

fluff.en: Skilled warrior and masterful leader, Uriel Ventris is one of the Ultramarines’ most capable commanders – if a maverick one. Having served in the Deathwatch before becoming Captain, he has absorbed the strategies of battle-brothers from a host of other Chapters, giving him a breadth of tactical insight exceeding that of many of his peers.

fluff.en: On the battlefield, Vanguard Veteran Squads with jump packs are peerless rapid-response troops as well as line breakers. With great plumes of fire extending behind them they can arrive at the perfect time and place to ensure the decisiveness of an assault or utterly break an enemy incursion.

description.en: While a **CAPTAIN** or **CHAPTER MASTER** model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was **destroyed** by those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

fluff.en: Composed of First Company veterans who demonstrate measured statecraft and peerless skill at arms, the Victrix Honour Guard serve as bodyguards for the Chapter’s senior officers. Chosen for their selflessness in battle, the warriors of the Victrix Honour Guard will gladly lay down their lives to protect their charges

fluff.en: The Vindicator is a dedicated siege tank. It can smash obstacles aside with its massive shield, rumbling into the perfect firing position to unleash its demolisher cannon, a weapon so destructive it can blow apart enemy fortifications, annihilate columns of infantry and shatter armoured tanks with terrifying ease.

fluff.en: Though usually seeded through the leadership strata of Captain Titus’ armies, his closest counsellors and comrades fight by his side as one when the situation demands. At such times they combine transhuman might, inspirational magnificence, martial excellence, psychic might and sheer cunning in a potent alloy greater than the sum of its parts.

fluff.en: Hails of missiles saturate the ground whenever a Whirlwind strikes, creating a carpet of explosions that launches deadly shrapnel or scorching flames in all directions. The Whirlwind fires from concealed positions in support of Space Marine attacks, utilising its speed to keep pace with the assault.
